title: Rendering Function
description: A object used to call some rendering related Function

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Minecraft Identifier with a namespace and path between a colon (:)

rendering_function_types.title: Rendering Function types
rendering_function_types.description: All possible Transformations valid within Accessories Transformation Type

transformation.title: Transformation
transformation.description: Allows for the transformation of the given inner rendering functions

transformations.title: Transformations
transformations.description: A List of transformations to before calling the the given rendering function

id.title: Model Identifier
id.description: The given Model Identifier attempting to be rendered

variant.title: Model Variant
variant.description: The variant info for the given model

block.title: Block
block.description: Renders the given block and any corresponding entity

id.title: Block Identifier
id.description: The given Block Identifier attempting to be rendered

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: The given block properties used to create a the given state

entity_id.title: Block Entity Identifier
entity_id.description: The given Block Entity Identifier attempting to be rendered

data.title: Block Entity Data
data.description: The given data to load for the given block entity

item.title: Item
item.description: Renders the given Item as a stack

id.title: Item Identifier
id.description: The given Item Identifier attempting to be rendered

count.title: Count
count.description: The given amount for the ItemStack

components.title: Components
components.description: Data components for the given ItemStack

entity_id.title: Block Entity Identifier
entity_id.description: The given Block Entity Identifier attempting to be rendered

data.title: Entity Data
data.description: The given data to load for the given entity

unique_id.title: Unique ID
unique_id.description: Id used when caching when the particle will fire

particle_data.title: Particle Data
particle_data.description: All data required to construct the particle

x.title: X Offset
x.description: The X offset applied to the created particle

y.title: Y Offset
y.description: The Y offset applied to the created particle

z.title: Z Offset
z.description: The Z offset applied to the created particle

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: The speed applied to the created particle

count.title: Count
count.description: The amount of particles to create

rendering_functions.title: Rendering Functions
rendering_functions.description: Rendering functions that will be rendered when the compound is unpacked

first_person_arm_target.title: Render In First Person
first_person_arm_target.description: Controls weather or not the given Render Functions will be rendered in First person

renderer.title: Renderer
renderer.description: Either a reference to a Renderer or a defined renderer

references.title: References
references.description: A map of reference key to string entry usable within id fields as a way to reuse a renderer structure

first_person_arm_target.title: Render In First Person
first_person_arm_target.description: Controls weather or not the given Render Functions will be rendered in First person

renderer_id.title: Renderer Identifier
renderer_id.description: The given Renderer Identifier attempting to be used to render

rendering_functions.title: Rendering Functions
rendering_functions.description: Rendering functions that will be rendered when the such is unpacked
